item.title: Jaime French on Kelly Clarkson
item.description: Jaime French shares a light take on Kelly Clarkson in this short video.

media:content.media:title: Jaime French on Kelly Clarkson
media:content.media:description: Jaime French shares a light take on Kelly Clarkson in this short video.

item.title: Jaime French on Mariah Carey’s moment
item.description: Jaime French takes a closer look at a Mariah Carey moment and shares a light, engaging take on it.

media:content.media:title: Jaime French on Mariah Carey’s moment
media:content.media:description: Jaime French takes a closer look at a Mariah Carey moment and shares a light, engaging take on it.
